chunks.text: - 1 - | P a g e Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI J.M. No.12 of 2011 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No.1141 of 2013. 2. For hearing of main application. 23.01.2026 Ms. Alizay Mehak, advocate for applicant. Mr. Shahjahan, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Imdad Ali Channa Advocate. ------------------------------------ Counsel for applicant submits that the subject patent No.139310 has expired on 06.07.2021, hence, the counsel no longer wishes to proceed with this J. Misc. which may be dismissed as withdrawn. Counsels are at ad-idem that this withdrawal is without prejudice to the rights of the parties in this J. Misc. Order accordingly. This J. Misc. stands dismissed in the above terms alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
